# opensverige

> Sveriges öppna community för dig som bygger AI-agenter. Gratis, ägarlöst, byggt av oss.

opensverige is Sweden's open community for AI agent builders. We support frameworks including CrewAI, LangGraph, AutoGen, and OpenClaw. The community operates via Discord (async) and IRL sessions in Swedish cities.

Pages:
- Home: https://opensverige.se
- Agent Radar: https://opensverige.se/radar
- Manifest: https://opensverige.se/manifest
- Blogg: https://opensverige.se/blogg

Contact:
- info@opensverige.se
- Discord: https://discord.gg/CSphbTk8En
